why: Protocol 775 Login clientbound minecraft:hello must dispatch id 0x01 to the official ClientboundHelloPacket body shape: serverId String, publicKey VarInt-prefixed byte array, challenge VarInt-prefixed byte array, and shouldAuthenticate boolean, all generated from client.jar through LoginProtocols.CLIENTBOUND.codec().
what: The exact Rust oracle test for login_hello_clientbound_framed_dispatch failed to compile against the current Stevenarella packet shape because packet::login::clientbound::EncryptionRequest has no should_authenticate field; the Protocol 775 clientbound Login table also currently maps only 0x00 LoginDisconnect, so the 0x01 hello dispatch support is missing from the active version shard.
